name: German Chocolate Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, dissolve yeast in water. Add sugar, salt, egg, butter and 1 cup of the flour. Beat until smooth. Gradually add remaining flour to form a soft dough.
2. Turn dough onto a floured board. Knead until smooth and elastic (about 3-5 minutes). Place in a greased bowl, turning once to grease top. Cover and let rest for 20 minutes.
3. Punch dough down. Press into the bottom and up the sides of a greased 15x10x1 inch baking pan.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add cocoa and sugar. Beat until fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, then vanilla. Pour over crust.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until crust is golden brown. Cool.
6. In a saucepan, combine first four topping ingredients. Cook over low heat until thick (about 8-10 minutes), stirring constantly. Remove from the heat and stir in vanilla, coconut, and nuts. Spread over cooled cake.
7. Chill at least 1 hour. Store in refrigerator.
